BltForCausalLM.reason: very_large tier (needs 1620s timeout). Was added 2026-04-12 as interim unblock for nightly sweeps that timed out at default 180s. Per-model timeout propagation now ships (2026-05-10); SHOULD BE REMOVABLE once next sweep verifies cleanly with the new per-tier wiring.
BltForCausalLM.follow_up_task: Verify BLT runs cleanly on next nightly with per-model timeout (1620s); then remove this entry. Tracked in PLAN.md WS1 'Per-model timeout propagation' Migration step.

BltModel.reason: very_large tier (needs 1620s timeout). Same root cause as BltForCausalLM — added 2026-04-12 as interim unblock for nightly sweeps timing out at default 180s.
BltModel.follow_up_task: Same as BltForCausalLM — verify on next nightly with per-model timeout, then remove.

ConditionalDetrModel.reason: DETR family — depends on timm which is intentionally out-of-scope for our test environment (pip install timm not in our setup). Skipped at the source-enumeration level for the same reason as the other DETR models below.

DabDetrModel.reason: DETR family — depends on timm which is intentionally out-of-scope for our test environment (pip install timm not in our setup). Skipped permanently per source-enumeration policy.

DeformableDetrModel.reason: DETR family — depends on timm which is intentionally out-of-scope for our test environment (pip install timm not in our setup). Skipped permanently per source-enumeration policy.

DetrModel.reason: DETR family — depends on timm which is intentionally out-of-scope for our test environment (pip install timm not in our setup). Skipped permanently per source-enumeration policy.

FLUX.1-DiT.reason: Custom-source model (corpora/custom-models registry, NOT HF transformers). The HF-only sweep default (2026-05-10) excludes custom-source models entirely; this skip-list entry is redundant under HF-only but kept for safety in case a future sweep re-enables custom source.
FLUX.1-DiT.follow_up_task: Re-evaluate when/if custom source is re-enabled; may be removable then.

FastVlmForConditionalGeneration.reason: FastVlm family had a stable failure pattern in identify pass (specific reason not recorded at add time). Added during a sweep cleanup pass; investigation needed.
FastVlmForConditionalGeneration.follow_up_task: Investigate failure mode + either fix at root OR document as upstream bug. Reason text needs backfill from sweep history.

FastVlmModel.reason: Same as FastVlmForConditionalGeneration — FastVlm family stable failure (specific reason not recorded). Investigation needed.
FastVlmModel.follow_up_task: Investigate with FastVlmForConditionalGeneration; remove together once root cause documented.

Gemma3nForConditionalGeneration.reason: Gemma3n family — was hitting compile-time issues that exceeded the default 180s timeout. Originally categorized as very_large but skipped pending per-model timeout wiring. With per-model timeout now shipped (2026-05-10), may be removable; needs verification.
Gemma3nForConditionalGeneration.follow_up_task: Verify Gemma3n runs cleanly on next nightly with per-model timeout (1620s); same status as BLT.

Gemma3nModel.reason: Same as Gemma3nForConditionalGeneration — Gemma3n family timeout issue. Per-model timeout now ships; needs verification before removal.
Gemma3nModel.follow_up_task: Same as Gemma3nForConditionalGeneration — verify on next nightly.

PeAudioVideoModel.reason: Stable eager_error in pure-eager forward (KeyError(None) per known_errors.json). Skipped at the sweep level (in addition to known_errors.json gating) to avoid running the failed eager pass at all.
PeAudioVideoModel.follow_up_task: Remove from skip_models.json IF the known_errors entry is removed; otherwise keep skipped.

PeVideoModel.reason: Same root cause as PeAudioVideoModel — stable eager-side failure in the Pe* family. Skipped to avoid running the failed eager pass.

PerceptionLMForConditionalGeneration.reason: PerceptionLM family had a stable failure pattern (specific reason not recorded at add time). Possibly transformers-version dependent.
PerceptionLMForConditionalGeneration.follow_up_task: Investigate failure mode; remove if fixed in newer transformers OR document upstream bug.

PerceptionLMModel.reason: Same as PerceptionLMForConditionalGeneration — PerceptionLM family stable failure (specific reason not recorded). Investigation needed.

TableTransformerModel.reason: DETR-family variant — depends on timm which is out-of-scope for our test environment (pip install timm not in our setup).

TimmWrapperModel.reason: TimmWrapper — depends on timm which is intentionally out-of-scope for our test environment (pip install timm not in our setup).
